title: Welcome to AnnieRealm
excerpt: A quick introduction to this space where I share game design thoughts, devlogs, and experiments.
content:
Welcome to AnnieRealm! This is where I document my journey as a game designer and developer.

I believe games are at their best when art and code work together — when the visuals aren't just decoration, but part of how the game thinks.

Here you'll find devlogs, design notes, art breakdowns, and experiments that escaped my notebook. Thanks for visiting!

title: Design Process Thoughts
excerpt: Some reflections on how I approach game design, balancing creativity with structure.
content:
I like to think of game design as a conversation between two minds: the Right Brain (art, feel, atmosphere) and the Left Brain (systems, mechanics, architecture).

The fun part is making them disagree until something interesting happens.

When I start a new project, I usually begin with either a mood or a mechanic. Sometimes it's a feeling I want to capture. Sometimes it's a system I want to explore. The key is letting both sides of the process inform each other.
